name: Common actions
description: Rules for action placement, emphasis, labelling and disabled state across all components

action_emphasis.rule: Use a single primary button per view/context. All others must be secondary or lower.
Close buttons, overflow actions. Always tertiary icon button with close icon.

action_vocabulary.label: Add
action_vocabulary.usage: Inserting an item to an existing list or set

action_vocabulary.label: Back
action_vocabulary.usage: Moving from one step to the previous in a sequence or wizard

action_vocabulary.label: Cancel
action_vocabulary.usage: Stops a current action or closes a component

action_vocabulary.label: Decline
action_vocabulary.usage: Stops a current action or closes a component

action_vocabulary.label: Clear
action_vocabulary.usage: Removes information from a field or selection

action_vocabulary.label: Close
action_vocabulary.usage: Dismisses or terminates a modal, menu, or flow

action_vocabulary.label: Delete
action_vocabulary.usage: Permanently removes or destroys an object

action_vocabulary.label: Edit
action_vocabulary.usage: Creates a state where data or values can be changed

action_vocabulary.label: Continue
action_vocabulary.usage: Moving from one step to the next in a sequence or wizard

action_vocabulary.label: Refresh
action_vocabulary.usage: Reloads data when displayed view is out of sync with source

action_vocabulary.label: Remove
action_vocabulary.usage: Clearing from a list. Recoverable. Contrast with Delete.

action_vocabulary.label: Reset
action_vocabulary.usage: Reverts to the latest saved data

placement_rules.note: Actions relating to the entire view. See Page header component.
Actions relating to a table or media gallery.
Common actions in cards, containers, toasts placed bottom left.
Next/Finish on right. Back on left. Never both on same side.
Always tertiary icon button with close icon. No exceptions.
Multiple inline actions: combine into icon button with option list.

disabled_state_rules.rule: Do not disable the primary button when form is incomplete
disabled_state_rules.detail: Do not use the disabled state of the primary button even if data is missing. Users may not understand why. Instead show an Inline notification explaining what needs to be done.

disabled_state_rules.rule: Contextual actions: show only when relevant
disabled_state_rules.detail: If button state depends on a selection (e.g. in universal action bar), only show active buttons initially. Reveal selection-specific actions after user selects.

general_rules.detail: Never show multiple primary buttons on the same view, page, or dialog.
Group related actions together. Arrange by importance right to left.

general_rules.rule: Do not centre-align secondary or semantic actions
general_rules.detail: Actions must be left- or right-aligned per placement rules. Never centred.

general_rules.rule: Button sequence right to left: primary → secondary → tertiary
general_rules.detail: In all top-placement contexts, primary is rightmost, tertiary leftmost.
